# Playwright Agent Prompts

These prompt files mirror the generated `opencode` agent prompts from:

- `.opencode/prompts/playwright-test-planner.md`
- `.opencode/prompts/playwright-test-generator.md`
- `.opencode/prompts/playwright-test-healer.md`

Canonical generated source for this repository is the `opencode` setup created by:

```bash
npx playwright init-agents --loop=opencode
```

The `.github/playwright-agents/` copy is committed for repository-wide visibility and workflows that inspect `.github` metadata.
